theme_archetype.name: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Editorial Twist
theme_archetype.rationale: For a premium career/resume platform, we need to instill trust and authority (Swiss layout) but with an editorial, old-money sophistication (serif headers, bone/terracotta colors) to distance it from cheap 'AI-slop'. The colors evoke calm confidence, warmth, and precision.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-heading font-medium
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-heading font-medium

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Elements should breathe.

grid_modes.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12 with bento overlap (Mode A)
grid_modes.dashboard_editor: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 with full utilization (Mode B)

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-sm (2px) to rounded-md (6px) max. Avoid overly pill-shaped elements for a sharp, editorial feel.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.accent: bg-accent text-white rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-text_primary hover:bg-border/50 rounded-sm px-6 py-3 transition-colors

cards.default: bg-surface border border-border rounded-md p-6 lg:p-8 shadow-sm
cards.marketing_bento: bg-surface border border-border rounded-md p-8 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-shadow

inputs.default: border-b border-border bg-transparent px-0 py-2 focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 transition-colors rounded-none placeholder:text-text_secondary/50
inputs.editor_panel: border border-border bg-surface px-3 py-2 text-sm rounded-sm focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/20

modals.style: Glassmorphism for overlays (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60), solid surfaces for modal bodies with 1px border

motion.scroll: Smooth scrolling mandatory (Lenis) for premium momentum feel in marketing pages.
motion.page_transitions: Fade in with subtle 10px Y-axis translation.
motion.hover_states: Crisp, fast color transitions (duration-200), subtle scale up for images/cards.
motion.stagger: List items and editor sections should use Framer Motion stagger (0.05s) on enter.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text passes APCA/WCAG AA against background.
accessibility.interactive: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='sign-in-button').
accessibility.focus: Clear focus rings on inputs and buttons using focus-visible:ring-2.

hero_background.description: Premium office space, use as low-opacity background for hero overlay

feature_templates.description: Abstract warm geometric shapes to decorate the templates showcase section

feature_ats.description: Tech/wavy lines background for ATS Score feature block

editor_context.description: Typing on laptop, use for 'start building' CTA block

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use default Tailwind colors like blue-500 or slate-900 unless mapping to the defined palette.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling in the marketing layout.
The Resume Editor should be 'cardless' or use 1px borders with square/sharp radii (max rounded-md). Avoid bubbly UI.
Use Playfair Display/Cormorant Garamond exclusively for large headings. Never use it for body text or UI components (buttons, inputs).
For the Indian UPI Payment flow, display a sharp, high-contrast QR code container with clear 'Upload UTR' input using the custom component styles.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all actionable items.

Include the developer credit exactly as requested in the footer: 'Created by Jagadeesh S Bentoor – Full Stack Developer | AI/ML Enthusiast' with Instagram link: https://www.instagram.com/god_of_world_j.
Do NOT use HTML for complex interactions. Use Shadcn components, but heavily customize them to remove the 'Vercel-look'.
Avoid purple/violet gradients entirely as per restrictions.
Editor Layout: Sidebar should be strictly functional (Archetype 4), minimizing visual noise to let the A4 Resume document preview stand out.
